pi_items.source: Task requirement; Appropriate name for a cardiology consultation ROS template
Verified as standard constitutional/general symptom included in cardiology ROS templates and appropriate for cardiac workups (Harvard Health, Johns Hopkins, American Heart Association sources)
Verified as the most common cardiovascular symptom in ROS; standard in cardiology documentation (MedlinePlus, ACC, Mayo Clinic sources)
Verified as standard cardiovascular symptom in ROS templates; included in cardiology assessments (Cleveland Clinic, American Heart Association sources)
Verified as classic sign of heart failure and cardiac dysfunction; standard cardiovascular ROS item (Cleveland Clinic, Mount Sinai, Johns Hopkins sources)
Verified as standard cardiovascular symptom; among most common symptoms of heart failure (American Heart Association, Cleveland Clinic, Mayo Clinic sources)
Verified: Dyspnea is the medical term for shortness of breath (uptodate.com, Cleveland Clinic, Wikipedia sources)
Verified: SOB is standard medical abbreviation for shortness of breath; used in clinical documentation

privileged_info_summary: NOSH ChartingSystem is a real, open-source EHR system with documented ROS template creation capabilities. The template name 'Cardio_Consult' is appropriate for a cardiology consultation template. All five required symptoms (Fatigue, Chest pain, Palpitations, Edema, Shortness of breath) are verified as standard cardiology ROS items. Fatigue is appropriate as a constitutional symptom for cardiac assessment. Dyspnea and SOB are verified as medical synonyms for shortness of breath. The symptom list represents a focused cardiology ROS appropriate for a cardiac consultation template.
